articles.title: Ikumi Nakamura’s Yokai-Hunting Game Resurfaces With Very Cool Gameplay Reveal
articles.summary: Ikumi Nakamura's Yokai-Hunting Game Resurfaces With Very Cool Gameplay Reveal Kemuri, a new demon-hunting action game from Ikumi Nakamura, debuted an incredibly slick trailer during PlayStation's June State of Play showcase. It's been a while since we last saw one of our video game presenter faves. Nakamura, known for her quirky-cool demeanor and infectious onstage presence, was last seen promoting Kemuri at the 2023 Game Awards. Now she's back to talk about the project with her new studio Unseen Inc. Kemuri has an interesting premise to match its cool-ass trailer. Players will track yokai down, possess them, and take on their powers to help them hunt bigger prey.
